label: New business
sampleInput: I'm starting a new business. I want to invoke peace and prosperity for my family.
whyPuja: You mentioned a new business and prayers for family peace and prosperity. Satyanarayan Puja is the most widely performed gratitude-and-blessing ritual for new beginnings in North Indian Smarta households — a prosperity prayer and a family blessing in one 2-hour home ceremony.
basisTag: Based on: your intent + panchang · Pandit-reviewed template

date.why: Satyanarayan Puja is traditionally performed on Purnima evening — the next Purnima is Jul 29.

alsoConsider.reason: Lakshmi-Ganesh Puja — if your focus is specifically wealth and removing business obstacles.

sankalpaPrefill: For peace and prosperity as we begin our new business

label: New home
sampleInput: We just moved into a new flat in HSR Layout.
whyPuja: A first night in a new home traditionally follows Griha Pravesh. Since your flat is newly occupied, Vastu Shanti is bundled to neutralize construction-related doshas.
basisTag: Based on: your intent + panchang · Pandit-reviewed template

date.why: Tritiya is among the traditionally auspicious Griha Pravesh tithis (suitability pending advisor confirmation).

alsoConsider.reason: Satyanarayan Puja — many families add it the same day as a gratitude ritual.

sankalpaPrefill: For lasting peace and happiness in our new home

label: Health & recovery
sampleInput: My father is having surgery next month. I want to pray for his health.
whyPuja: For a family member's surgery and recovery, the Maha Mrityunjaya Jaap (108 chants) is the traditional protection ritual. Mondays and early morning (Brahma Muhurta) are most auspicious.
basisTag: Based on: your intent + panchang · Pandit-reviewed template

date.why: Mondays are sacred to Shiva; early morning Brahma Muhurta is ideal for the 108-chant jaap.
date.alt: Festival option: first Shravan Monday (early Aug)

alsoConsider.reason: Satyanarayan Puja — a gratitude ceremony once recovery is underway.

sankalpaPrefill: For my father's healing, protection, and full recovery

label: New beginning
sampleInput: New job — I want to start it right.
whyPuja: New beginnings traditionally open with Ganesha. A short 45–60 minute home puja on a Wednesday clears the path — simple enough to do before your joining date.
basisTag: Based on: your intent + panchang · Pandit-reviewed template

date.detail: Shukla Pratipada · Pushya Nakshatra · morning 9:30 – 11:00 AM
date.why: Avoids Rahu Kalam (12:27 – 2:10 PM in Delhi). Abhijit Muhurat is not observed on Wednesdays.

alsoConsider.reason: Satyanarayan Puja — if the family wants a fuller gratitude ceremony.

sankalpaPrefill: For a strong, obstacle-free start in my new role

label: Blessing & well-being
sampleInput: I want blessings for my family.
whyPuja: Your words don't match one of our reviewed scripts exactly, so we're suggesting the most widely performed all-purpose blessing: Satyanarayan Puja — a gratitude-and-blessing ceremony for family well-being. A pandit will read your exact words and confirm or adjust the recommendation on WhatsApp.
basisTag: Based on: closest reviewed template · pending pandit review

date.why: Satyanarayan Puja is traditionally performed on Purnima evening — the next Purnima is Jul 29.

alsoConsider.reason: Ganesh Puja — a shorter blessing if this is about one specific new beginning.

sankalpaPrefill: For the well-being and happiness of my family

label: Prosperity
sampleInput: Business has been slow lately, money is stuck.
whyPuja: Financial stagnation calls for Lakshmi's blessings, but Ganesha is always worshipped first so obstacles don't block them. Friday is Lakshmi's day — sustained weekly practice is common among shop owners.
basisTag: Based on: your intent + panchang · Pandit-reviewed template

date.detail: Lakshmi's day · Shukla Tritiya · evening 6:30 – 8:00 PM
date.why: Friday is sacred to Lakshmi; evening lamps invite her in — Lakshmi never enters a dark house.

alsoConsider.reason: Satyanarayan Puja — a broader gratitude-and-blessing ritual for the whole family.

sankalpaPrefill: For the revival of our business and steady prosperity at home
